hero.subtitle: A protocol for exploring human values.

structure.title: A clear structure
structure.p1: YonyFâ is a structured framework for exploring human values.
structure.item3: A method of individual and collective expression
structure.note: The protocol offers neither doctrine nor a single interpretation. It provides an open structure that anyone can engage with in their own way.

values.title: The 16 values
values.intro: These values form the foundation of the protocol. They can be studied, experienced, discussed, and interpreted.
values.outro: The goal is not to fix their definition, but to enable active exploration.

dynamics.title: The 256 dynamics
dynamics.p1: Each value can be combined with another.
dynamics.p2: Each combination becomes a field of experimentation.
dynamics.note: Dynamics can be drawn at random and explored individually or as a group. This architecture creates a potentially infinite space for exploration.

practice.title: A living practice
practice.intro: YonyFâ is meant to be practiced. Members can contribute:
practice.outro: The platform allows sharing these contributions and enriching collective understanding.

workshops.title: Workshops
workshops.intro: Workshops can be organized locally, facilitated by Weavers trained in the protocol.

publications.title: Publications
publications.intro: Community contributions feed into publications. These works gather:
publications.outro: They constitute an evolving memory of the project.

communitySection.title: Join the community
communitySection.intro: YonyFâ is a structured and open space. You can:
communitySection.note: The protocol is stable. Interpretations are many.

footer.description: A pedagogical protocol for exploring human values.
